brief_title: Real-World Effectiveness of Bevacizumab Based on AURELIA in Platinum-resistant Recurrent Ovarian Cancer
official_title: Real-World Effectiveness of Bevacizumab Based on AURELIA in Platinum-resistant Recurrent Ovarian Cancer

pmids.citation: Lee JY, Park JY, Park SY, Lee JW, Kim JW, Kim YB, Jeong DH, Lee KB, Kim TH, Lee IH, Choi MC, Kim KH, Kim YM, Lee YJ, Kang S; KGOG Investigators; Pujade-Lauraine E. Real-world effectiveness of bevacizumab based on AURELIA in platinum-resistant recurrent ovarian cancer (REBECA): A Korean Gynecologic Oncology Group study (KGOG 3041). Gynecol Oncol. 2019 Jan;152(1):61-67. doi: 10.1016/j.ygyno.2018.10.031. Epub 2018 Nov 6.
